name: agent-coordination-skills
description: File-based control plane for coordinating multiple Copilot CLI agents: atomic task claiming with dependency gating, leased resource locks with heartbeat-based reaping, checkpointed shared state, and staleness-filtered messaging. Adds a navigator planner/cockpit that proposes human-approved plans, an autonomous reconcile loop (tick/run) with coded acceptance gates and escalations, five skills (coordination-protocol, orchestrator, worker, navigator, self-update), four scoped agents (orchestrator/researcher/editor/navigator), a write-scope enforcement hook, and an offline self-update helper.
